session.user:
Run the following CI checks and report results:
1. Run ruff check on the changed file: `ruff check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/roadmap.py` 2. Run ruff format check: `ruff format --check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/roadmap.py` 3. Run ty check: `ty check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/roadmap.py` 4. Run pytest on roadmap-related tests: `pytest tests/ -k roadmap --no-header -q`
Report all results.
session.assistant: I'll run these CI checks on the roadmap.py file and related tests.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff linting check on roadmap.py

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff format check on roadmap.py

tool_use.name: Bash

session.assistant:
Perfect! All CI checks have passed. Here's the summary:
## CI Check Results
**1. Ruff Linting Check** - ruff check passed: All checks passed!
**2. Ruff Format Check** - ruff format check passed: File is already properly formatted (1 file already formatted)
**3. Type Check (ty)** - ty check passed: All checks passed!
**4. Pytest - Roadmap Tests** - pytest passed: 40 tests passed (indicated by 40 dots at 100%)
All four CI checks are passing successfully. The changed file at `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/roadmap.py` is clean on linting, formatting, type safety, and all related tests are passing.
